title: POST-H-017-B — Environment snapshot redactado
commands: python -m devpilot_core schema validate --schema-id ReleaseEnvironmentSnapshot --instance outputs/release/environment_snapshot.json --json
pass_criteria: Environment snapshot captures Python version, platform, package manager signal and declared dependency names from local manifests.
Snapshot validates against ReleaseEnvironmentSnapshot schema after generation.
Synthetic .env secret content does not appear in snapshot output.
POST-H-017-B is synchronized across README, runbook, backlog, source registry, project state and TCR v1/v2.
block_criteria: BLOCK if any .env file content is read into the snapshot.
BLOCK if environment variable values or secret values are included.
BLOCK if the command uses network, external APIs, remote execution, connector write or plugin execution.
BLOCK if generated outputs/release/environment_snapshot.json does not validate against ReleaseEnvironmentSnapshot.
BLOCK if POST-H-017-B is not registered in TCR v1/v2 and docs governance.
risks: Snapshot is diagnostic evidence only; it is not the final reproducibility pack.
Package manager versions for node/npm are not executed; this avoids shell/network risk but provides a limited signal until later release hardening.
Future POST-H-017-C/D/E must bind this snapshot to source archive manifests, checksums, verifier and quality gate.
